assets.purpose: Required fields of an investigation spec: goal, budget, surface map, ranked hypotheses, deep-dives, replans, stop reason, deliverable.
Budget rules, cheap/expensive tool split, the single legal re-plan trigger (hypothesis_invalidated), stop reasons, and blocked anti-patterns.
Stable Markdown shape rendered by the deterministic compiler for the investigation report.
Scored, mostly-blocking acceptance criteria mapped to the gate and the fail-closed evals.
Human pre-delivery checklist mirroring the acceptance gate, with evidence tags.
